name: SAIA INC
business: Saia provides national less-than-truckload (LTL) services, with approximately 97% of its revenue derived from transporting LTL shipments. It also offers brokered truckload and expedited transportation and other logistics services across North America. The company serves the 48 contiguous states and provides LTL services to Canada and Mexico through third-party interline carriers.
sellsTo: customers needing LTL freight services for shipments between 100 and 10,000 pounds
shippers across various industries in the contiguous United States
customers requiring time-definite and expedited shipping options

exposures.sentence: We provide national less-than-truckload (LTL) services through a single integrated organization.

We use artificial intelligence in our business, and its use could result in increased costs, reputational harm, competitive harm, cybersecurity risks and legal liability, which could have a material adverse effect on our business.
We are regularly subject to claims resulting from personal injury, cargo loss, property damage, group healthcare and workers compensation claims and cybersecurity threats.

Since the formalization of our sustainability program in 2022, we have scaled the use of alternative fuels utilizing renewable diesel, compressed natural gas (CNG) vehicles running renewable natural gas (RNG) and battery electric vehicles.

catalysts.event: General rate increase of 5.9% for customers comprising approximately 25% of operating revenue implemented
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, Saia implemented a 5.9 percent general rate increase for customers comprising approximately 25 percent of Saia's operating revenue.
Projected net capital expenditures for 2026 are expected to be $350 million to $400 million compared to 2025 net capital expenditures of $544.1 million.
